auth.title: Welcome

auth.signupSuccess: Account created – please confirm your email.
auth.termsHint: By signing in you accept our <1>Terms</1> and <3>Privacy Policy</3>.

home.tagline: Create a professional price quote in just a few minutes.
home.ctaNewSub: Describe the job – AI structures & calculates it
home.trialLeft: {{left}} of {{limit}} trial PDFs left – pick a plan now →
home.trialUsedBody: You've used all {{limit}} free PDFs. Pick a plan to keep generating PDFs →

billing.title: Subscription & invoices
billing.trialIntro: Generate {{limit}} PDFs for free to try out the app.
billing.trialUsedBody: You've used all {{limit}} free trial PDFs. Pick a plan to generate more.
billing.noActivePlan: You don't have an active subscription right now.
billing.pastDueWarning: The last payment failed. Please update your payment details in the customer portal.
billing.downloadFailed: Download failed. Retry or open in a new tab.
billing.footer: Invoices and payment details are handled via Paddle.

settings.title: Settings
settings.ratesHelp: Mark your default rate with the star. It is used whenever you don't pick another one.
settings.atLeastOneRate: At least one hourly rate is required

pricing.title: Plans
pricing.heading: Choose your plan
pricing.sub: Fair cancellation terms. No hidden fees.
pricing.trialBody: Still <1>{{left}} of {{limit}} trial PDFs</1> left. Pick a plan afterwards to keep generating PDFs.
pricing.trialUsedBody: You've used all {{limit}} free PDFs. Pick a plan to keep generating PDFs.
pricing.yearlyHintBest: ✓ Best choice – save 17% compared to monthly billing
pricing.yearlyHintTip: Tip: With yearly billing you save <1>17%</1>
pricing.quotaInfoTitle: What counts as an AI quote?
pricing.quotaInfoBody: Each time you generate a new AI quote it counts as one. PDF downloads, previews and re-opening older quotes do <1>not</1> count.
pricing.quotaInfoMonthlyBody: The quota applies <1>per month</1> and resets at the start of each month – regardless of monthly or yearly billing. Unused quotes expire at month end.
pricing.cancelMonthly: <1>Monthly:</1> Cancel by the end of the current month – the subscription ends with the next month.
pricing.cancelYearly: <1>Yearly:</1> Cancel up to <1>1 month before the end</1> of the contract year. Without cancellation it renews for another year.
pricing.cancelFooter: Payments are processed via Paddle. All prices incl. VAT.

starter.name: Light
starter.tagline: Price quotes with your company details
starter.quota: Up to 15 AI price quotes / month
features: PDF download with company & address details
Customer text to copy for email
No own logo & company colors in the PDF

profi.name: Profi
profi.tagline: PDFs with your own letterhead + WhatsApp message
profi.quota: Up to 50 AI price quotes / month
features: Own logo & company colors in the PDF letterhead
Professional WhatsApp short message directly to the customer

profiplus.name: Exklusiv
profiplus.quota: Up to 200 AI price quotes / month
